title: Owners
subtitle: Register property owners and give them portal access so they can see how you manage their properties
emptyDescription: Register property owners so you can give them access to their portal.

dialog.title: New owner
dialog.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

panel.title: Managing {{ name }}
panel.loadError: Failed to load the owner's properties
panel.inviteHelp: Send an invitation so the owner sets their own password and logs in to see their properties, statements and contracts. You never see their password.
panel.inviteSent: Invitation generated. Share the link with the owner.
panel.inviteHint: Share this one-time link with the owner so they set their password. In production it is also emailed to them. The link expires in 24 hours.
panel.reinviteHelp: If the owner forgot their password, resend the invitation so they set a new one.
